  1. org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.exception

Uses of Package
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.exception

Packages that use org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.exception
Package
Description
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.exception
A collection of Exceptions.
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.xml.builder
Classes for builder XML elements and documents.
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.xml.builder.spi
Several classes that are not part of the API for the XML builder tools, but required to implement tools for other, XML-derived languages, like SVG or HTML.
  • Classes in org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.exception used by org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.exception
    Class
    Description
    NullArgumentException
    This is a specialised implementation for the IllegalArgumentException that should be used instead of the latter in cases where null is provided as an illegal argument value.
    UnexpectedExceptionError
    This implementation of Error should be thrown in all cases where an unexpected exception was caught.
    ValidationException
    This is a specialised implementation for the IllegalArgumentException that is meant as the root for a hierarchy of exceptions caused by validation errors.
  • Classes in org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.exception used by org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.xml.builder
    Class
    Description
    IllegalOperationException
    This implementation of RuntimeException will be thrown when an attempted operation is not valid for the current context.
  • Classes in org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.exception used by org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.xml.builder.spi
    Class
    Description
    IllegalOperationException
    This implementation of RuntimeException will be thrown when an attempted operation is not valid for the current context.
